classifieds_171.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
1. The agent failed to correctly interpret "oldest listing". The default sort was "Newly listed", and there was no option to sort by "Oldest listed". The agent navigated through several pages but did not attempt to reach the very last page of results, which would contain the oldest listings under a "Newly listed" sort.
2. The agent misinterpreted "hot pink screen in the image". The listing selected had a hot pink *case*, not a hot pink *screen*.
classifieds_171.REFLECTION: When the objective requires finding the "oldest" item and only "newly listed" sorting is available, the agent must navigate to the very last page of results to find the oldest items. Additionally, pay extremely close attention to specific visual details in the objective, such as "hot pink *screen*", to avoid misinterpreting similar but incorrect visual cues like a "hot pink *case*".
